Brand Identity System — Confidential
MUSCLE
PUFF
The High-Protein Cigarette™
Founded by Faith & Grace · Inspired by Mom
⚠ Warning
May cause unexpected gains. Not a substitute for a balanced diet or exercise. Protein is infused, not inhaled. Results vary. Faith and Grace are dogs and hold honorary executive titles. Please consult your vet and/or nutritionist.
01 — Origin Story
WHERE IT ALL
BEGAN

It started, as most great ideas do, with a mom. A woman on a mission — to get back in the gym, rebuild her strength, and prove that transformation is always possible, no matter where you start.

Her two most loyal training partners weren’t human. They were Faith — fluffy, focused, and perpetually ready for a walk — and Grace — the visionary with the pink heart glasses who saw the world differently from day one.

“If my dogs believed in me this hard, maybe there was something to this whole health thing.”

From that revelation, Muscle Puff was born: a brand that takes the absurdity of wellness culture and runs with it — full speed — into something genuinely motivating, wildly irreverent, and protein-packed. Every puff is a reminder that your healthiest era starts now. Probably.

5g
Protein Per Smoke — Infused, Not Inhaled
2
CEOs. Both Dogs. Both Excellent.
1

02 — Executive Leadership
MEET THE CEOs
Co-Chief Executive Officer
Vision & Vibe
Grace
Co-CEO · Chief Visionary Officer
Grace doesn’t chase trends — trends chase Grace. With her iconic pink heart sunglasses and unflinching confidence, she set the brand’s visual direction from a reclined position on the family couch. Every design decision is filtered through one question: “Would Grace approve?”
Full Title
Co-CEO · Chief Visionary Officer · Sunglasses Curator
Specialty
Branding, aesthetics, velvet surfaces
Signature Move
Heart-glasses power stare
Management Style
Visionary but delegating
Protein Preference
Grape & Gains (Limited)
Board Attendance
Only if the couch is nearby
Co-Chief Executive Officer
Operations & Morale
Faith
Co-CEO · Chief Energy Officer
Faith is the beating heart of Muscle Puff. From her cupcake bandana to her relentless pursuit of both squirrels and personal bests, she embodies the brand’s core philosophy: show up, give everything, and look adorable while doing it. Employee of every month since founding.
Full Title
Co-CEO · Chief Energy Officer · Head of Hype
Specialty
Morale, cardio, bandana styling
Signature Move
Full-speed car seat arrival
Management Style

Protein Preference

Board Attendance
First to arrive, last to leave

05 — Typography
THE TYPE
Display
Bebas Neue
Used for: Headlines, Logo, Stat Numbers, Major Callouts
Weight: Regular
Case: ALL CAPS always
BULK UP
WHILE YOU
LIGHT UP
Sub-Display
Barlow Condensed
Used for: Subheadings, Labels, Badges, Eyebrows
Weight: 900 Italic / 700
Case: ALL CAPS
5G PROTEIN
PER SMOKE.
NO EXCUSES.
Body
Space Grotesk
Used for: Body copy, descriptions, specs
Weight: 400–600
Case: Sentence case
Faith and Grace didn’t ask to be in the fitness industry. They were recruited — by circumstance, by love, and by a mother who decided that her comeback era was non-negotiable. Muscle Puff exists because transformation, even when absurd, is always worth celebrating.

07 — Voice & Tone
HOW WE TALK
Muscle Puff IS
  • Absurdist but earnest — we know it’s ridiculous, and we mean it
  • Gym-bro meets wellness mom energy — inclusive, loud, loving
  • Dog-forward — Faith and Grace are referenced often, always reverently
  • Parody that actually motivates — funny gets you in the door, real keeps you there
  • Proud of the journey, not just the destination
  • Built on a comeback story — never punching down
Muscle Puff IS NOT
  • Actually promoting smoking — ever, under any circumstances
  • Body-shaming or diet-culture adjacent
  • Too cool to care — we care deeply, visibly, loudly
  • Corporate or sanitized — authenticity is the whole brand
  • Taking itself so seriously it forgets to be fun
  • Excluding anyone from the gains conversation
MUSCLE PUFF
08 — Mission Statement
WE EXIST FOR THE COMEBACK
Muscle Puff was born from a mother’s decision to start again. To get back in the gym. To believe that gains, in any form, are worth celebrating. Our co-CEOs — Faith and Grace — embody everything this brand stands for: unconditional loyalty, pure enthusiasm, and the unshakeable belief that today is a good day to be strong. Whatever that looks like for you.
MUSCLE PUFF
The High-Protein Cigarette™ — Protein Infused, Not Inhaled
